title: Authorise the issue of test results
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Authorise the issue of test results demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Verify the accuracy of data and technical records

pcs.text: Access relevant job instructions, data and technical records in laboratory information management system (LIMS)
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Access relevant job instructions, data and technical records in laboratory information management system (LIMS)?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access relevant job instructions, data and technical records in laboratory information management system (LIMS).

pcs.text: Confirm that technical records provide sufficient information to ensure traceability for the tests involved
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm that technical records provide sufficient information to ensure traceability for the tests involved?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm that technical records provide sufficient information to ensure traceability for the tests involved.

pcs.text: Compare data with expected values and identify any outliers
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Compare data with expected values and identify any outliers?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compare data with expected values and identify any outliers.

pcs.text: Inspect data records to check the integrity of data entry, alterations, transfers and calculations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect data records to check the integrity of data entry, alterations, transfers and calculations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect data records to check the integrity of data entry, alterations, transfers and calculations.

pcs.text: Correct and initial any incorrect data records
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Correct and initial any incorrect data records?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Correct and initial any incorrect data records.

pcs.text: Sign off data records as correct
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Sign off data records as correct?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Sign off data records as correct.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Verify the accuracy of data and technical records

elements.title: Determine if results are acceptable and within expectation

pcs.text: Compare results with expected values and identify any significant differences
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Compare results with expected values and identify any significant differences?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compare results with expected values and identify any significant differences.

pcs.text: Check the reliability of results by examining data, statistical analysis of data and results from repeat tests or duplicate samples
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check the reliability of results by examining data, statistical analysis of data and results from repeat tests or duplicate samples?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check the reliability of results by examining data, statistical analysis of data and results from repeat tests or duplicate samples.

pcs.text: Assess the significance of any documented observations of atypical test conditions or environment and/or sample appearance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the significance of any documented observations of atypical test conditions or environment and/or sample appearance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the significance of any documented observations of atypical test conditions or environment and/or sample appearance.

pcs.text: Check that all calculations are free from error
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check that all calculations are free from error?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check that all calculations are free from error.

pcs.text: Check that estimates of uncertainty are reasonable and consistent with the test method, client and/or product specification requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check that estimates of uncertainty are reasonable and consistent with the test method, client and/or product specification requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check that estimates of uncertainty are reasonable and consistent with the test method, client and/or product specification requirements.

pcs.text: Authorise the issue of results that meet the organisation's quality standards and are consistent with expectations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Authorise the issue of results that meet the organisation's quality standards and are consistent with expectations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Authorise the issue of results that meet the organisation's quality standards and are consistent with expectations.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Determine if results are acceptable and within expectation

elements.title: Investigate unexpected or unacceptable results

pcs.text: Examine records of pre-use checks and calibration performance to ensure that the equipment and/or instruments used meet test specifications and workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Examine records of pre-use checks and calibration performance to ensure that the equipment and/or instruments used meet test specifications and workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Examine records of pre-use checks and calibration performance to ensure that the equipment and/or instruments used meet test specifications and workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Establish whether human and/or environmental factors could have affected the reliability of results
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish whether human and/or environmental factors could have affected the reliability of results?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish whether human and/or environmental factors could have affected the reliability of results.

pcs.text: Check for obvious sources of interferences that may have occurred during measurements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check for obvious sources of interferences that may have occurred during measurements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check for obvious sources of interferences that may have occurred during measurements.

pcs.text: Retrieve stored samples (if available) and assess whether they are atypical or contaminated
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Retrieve stored samples (if available) and assess whether they are atypical or contaminated?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Retrieve stored samples (if available) and assess whether they are atypical or contaminated.

pcs.text: Perform control tests using the same, or new, samples to check unexpected results
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform control tests using the same, or new, samples to check unexpected results?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform control tests using the same, or new, samples to check unexpected results.

pcs.text: Authorise the issue of unexpected results that meet the organisation's quality standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Authorise the issue of unexpected results that meet the organisation's quality standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Authorise the issue of unexpected results that meet the organisation's quality standards.

pcs.text: Identify possible root causes of unacceptable results and appropriate preventative/corrective actions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify possible root causes of unacceptable results and appropriate preventative/corrective actions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify possible root causes of unacceptable results and appropriate preventative/corrective actions.

pcs.text: Report investigation outcomes and recommendations for improvements in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report investigation outcomes and recommendations for improvements in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report investigation outcomes and recommendations for improvements in accordance with workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Investigate unexpected or unacceptable results

elements.title: Liaise with clients about results

pcs.text: Establish whether sampling procedures used by the client could contribute to unexpected/unacceptable results
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish whether sampling procedures used by the client could contribute to unexpected/unacceptable results?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish whether sampling procedures used by the client could contribute to unexpected/unacceptable results.

pcs.text: Arrange for new samples and/or re-testing as necessary
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Arrange for new samples and/or re-testing as necessary?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Arrange for new samples and/or re-testing as necessary.

pcs.text: Explain investigation outcomes and confidence level for unexpected test results
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Explain investigation outcomes and confidence level for unexpected test results?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Explain investigation outcomes and confidence level for unexpected test results.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Liaise with clients about results
